title: dondia diffusa
intro: Dondia diffusa, also known as Kalmegh, is a small herbaceous plant belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its bitter and acrid taste, which is used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Dondia diffusa include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and boosting the immune system. Dondia diffusa is often prepared as an herbal tea or used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine, where it is mixed with other herbs to create remedies for various health issues.
